name: Rolling Hamper White with Daydream Green Handles - Brightroom™
description:
Beat laundry day stress with the help of this Rolling Hamper with Handles from Brightroom™. Designed in a deep rectangular silhouette, this laundry hamper features an open-top design for easily sorting through clothes. This two-in-one laundry basket and hamper features a mesh design for ventilation, and the rolling handle and two caster wheels make it easy to maneuver. Best of all, the white hue with green handles and wheels adds a sweet pop of color.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
